html:
📰 每日 AI 新聞 Top 10 · 2026-07-17
1. Moonshot AI Unveils Kimi K3, Rivaling Latest Claude and GPT Models模型
Moonshot AI發表Kimi K3，效能逼近Claude與GPT最新模型
Chinese AI firm Moonshot AI launched Kimi K3, a mixture-of-experts model with 2.8 trillion parameters and a 1-million-token context window, claiming performance on par with Claude Fable 5 and GPT 5.6 Sol. Full model weights are set to release on July 27.
中國AI業者Moonshot AI發表最新模型Kimi K3，採混合專家架構，總參數量達2.8兆，支援100萬token脈絡長度，號稱效能達到Claude Fable 5與GPT 5.6 Sol水準。完整模型權重預計7月27日釋出。
iThome · 原文連結
2. EU Orders Google to Open Android AI Features and Share Search Data政策
歐盟要求Google開放Android AI功能並共享搜尋資料
The European Commission issued two binding rules under the Digital Markets Act requiring Google to open Android's AI interoperability features and share anonymized search data with qualifying rivals. Google warns the changes could endanger user privacy and security.
歐盟執委會依《數位市場法》發布兩項具法律約束力規範，要求Google開放Android AI互通功能並分享匿名化搜尋資料給合格第三方。Google警告此舉恐危及使用者隱私與安全。
Ars Technica · 原文連結
3. OpenAI's Internal Red-Team Model GPT-Red Cuts Prompt Injection Success to 0.05%研究
內部紅隊模型GPT-Red自動找漏洞，GPT-5.6 Sol提示注入攻擊成功率降至0.05%
OpenAI built an internal red-teaming model, GPT-Red, that uses self-play reinforcement learning to automatically generate prompt-injection attacks against production models and AI agents. GPT-5.6 Sol now resists direct injection from GPT-Red with only a 0.05% success rate.
OpenAI運用內部安全紅隊模型GPT-Red，透過自我對戰強化學習自動產生提示注入攻擊，找出產品模型與AI代理系統弱點。GPT-5.6 Sol面對直接提示注入時，攻擊成功率僅0.05%。
iThome · 原文連結
4. Claude Can Now Use Your 1Password Credentials產品
Claude現在可以使用你的1Password憑證
1Password launched a browser integration for Claude that lets the Anthropic chatbot access stored usernames and passwords. Users can authorize Claude to complete multi-step tasks like booking travel and managing online accounts.
1Password推出Claude瀏覽器整合功能，讓Anthropic的聊天機器人能存取儲存的帳號密碼等憑證。使用者可授權Claude完成訂票、管理線上帳戶等多步驟任務。
The Verge · 原文連結
5. Thinking Machines Bets Against One-Size-Fits-All AI With First Open Model, Inkling模型
Thinking Machines發表首款開源模型Inkling，挑戰統一規格AI路線
Thinking Machines released Inkling, its first open model and first public proof point after a year and a half spent quietly building AI infrastructure. The launch underscores the startup's bet against a one-size-fits-all approach to AI.
AI新創Thinking Machines發表首款開源模型Inkling，這是該公司歷經一年半低調建構AI基礎設施後首次公開成果，展現反對「一套模型打天下」的策略路線。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
6. CISA Warns of Actively Exploited Critical Flaws in Fortinet Sandbox Platform資安
CISA警告Fortinet沙箱平臺重大漏洞遭到利用
CISA added three actively exploited vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, including two affecting Fortinet's FortiSandbox system, and ordered federal agencies to patch them by July 19.
美國CISA已掌握3個遭積極利用的漏洞證據並列入已遭利用漏洞名單，其中兩個為Fortinet沙箱系統FortiSandbox的已知漏洞，要求聯邦機構須於7月19日前完成修補。
iThome · 原文連結
7. Coca-Cola's Fairlife Dairy Unit Hit by Ransomware, US Production Halted資安
可口可樂旗下乳品公司遭勒索軟體攻擊，美國生產作業停擺
Fairlife, Coca-Cola's protein-fortified dairy subsidiary, was hit by a ransomware attack this week that forced its US factories to suspend operations. The company has manufacturing sites in Michigan, Arizona, New York, and Ontario, Canada.
可口可樂旗下乳品子公司fairlife本週遭勒索軟體攻擊，迫使美國多座工廠暫停運作。該公司在密西根、亞利桑那、紐約及加拿大安大略均設有生產據點。
iThome · 原文連結
8. US War Department Suspends CMMC Phase 2, Reviews Contractor Cybersecurity Certification政策
美國戰爭部暫停CMMC第二階段，檢討國防承包商資安認證制度
On July 13, the US War Department announced it is immediately suspending Phase 2 requirements of the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) program, which governs cybersecurity standards for defense contractors.
美國戰爭部7月13日宣布，立即暫停網路安全成熟度模型認證（CMMC）第二階段要求，並重新檢討國防承包商的資安認證制度。
iThome · 原文連結
9. Nearly 80% of Organizations Use AI for Security, but Only 36% Have Formal AI Risk Programs研究
近8成組織將AI用於資安，但僅36%建立正式AI風險管理計畫
A SANS Institute survey found organizations incorporating AI into their security strategy jumped from 50% in 2025 to 78% in 2026, while those with formal AI risk management and compliance programs rose only slightly, from 35% to 36%.
SANS Institute調查指出，將AI納入資安策略的組織比例從2025年的50%升至2026年的78%，但建立正式AI風險管理計畫的比例僅由35%微幅增至36%，僅27%受訪者認為AI部署已臻成熟。
iThome · 原文連結
10. Singapore Land Authority Data Breach Exposes 70,000 People After IBM Test Data Left Unmasked資安
新加坡土地管理局委外系統遭非法存取，IBM測試資料未去識別化致7萬人個資外洩
Singapore's Land Authority disclosed that IBM, which manages development and test environments for two of its outsourced cloud systems, reported unauthorized access to those environments, confirmed to have exposed personal data belonging to roughly 70,000 people.
新加坡土地管理局公告，供應商IBM通報其負責的兩套系統開發測試環境遭非法存取，目前確認約7萬人個資因測試資料未去識別化而外洩。
iThome · 原文連結
